title: Including Project Management Deliverables in a Work Breakdown Structure (WBS)
summary: Explains how to integrate project management deliverables such as budget, budget release schedule, and milestones into a Work Breakdown Structure, including the option of a separate methodology WBS.
content: In addition to solution deliverables, a WBS may include project management deliverables such as Budget, Budget Release Schedule, and Milestones. Some teams prefer a separate Project Methodology WBS that complements the solution WBS. Including these deliverables ensures that management artifacts are tracked alongside product, service, or process components, providing a comprehensive view of all work required for project execution.
can_answer: How can project management deliverables be incorporated into a WBS?
What is the best way to represent budget and milestones in a WBS?
examples: Workplace Relocation Project WBS showing Budget and Budget Release Schedule
